1. Tap Copy on a code block
2. Paste in clipboard
Expected Result: Code copied to clipboard on Copy button tap

Scenario: Verify topic title correct in screen header
Steps:
1. Open a topic
2. Verify header title
Expected Result: Screen header shows correct topic name

Scenario: Verify "Previous" and "Next" navigation between subtopics
Steps:
1. Open subtopic
2. Tap Next
3. Verify next subtopic
Expected Result: Next/Previous navigation moves between sequential subtopics

Scenario: Verify topic font size adjustable in settings
Steps:
1. Change font size in settings
2. Open topic
3. Verify size change
Expected Result: Topic content font size adjusts based on user settings

Scenario: Verify images in topics load with proper alt text
Steps:
1. Open topic with images
2. Verify alt text present
Expected Result: Topic images have descriptive alt text for accessibility

Scenario: Verify topic bookmark persists across sessions
Steps:
1. Bookmark a topic
2. Kill and reopen app
3. Verify still bookmarked
Expected Result: Topic bookmark persists across app restarts

Scenario: Verify "Mark All Complete" button marks all subtopics
Steps:
1. Open topic
2. Tap "Mark All Complete"
3. Verify all checked
Expected Result: All subtopics marked as complete simultaneously

Scenario: Verify topic last accessed date shown correctly
Steps:
1. Open a topic
2. Navigate away
3. Return to list
4. Check last accessed
Expected Result: Topic card shows "Last accessed: today" or correct date

Scenario: Navigate to profile screen from dashboard
Steps: 1. Login. 2. Tap on profile icon or tab
Expected Result: Profile screen should load successfully

Scenario: Verify UI elements on profile screen
Steps: 1. Navigate to Profile
Expected Result: Name, email, avatar, edit button should be visible

Scenario: Edit profile - valid data
Steps: 1. Tap Edit. 2. Update name and phone. 3. Save
Expected Result: Profile should update and show success message

Scenario: Edit profile - invalid phone number
Steps: 1. Tap Edit. 2. Enter invalid phone. 3. Save
Expected Result: Error message 'Invalid phone number format'

Scenario: Edit profile - empty name
Steps: 1. Tap Edit. 2. Clear name field. 3. Save
Expected Result: Error message 'Name is required'

Scenario: Cancel profile edit
Steps: 1. Tap Edit. 2. Change name. 3. Tap Cancel
Expected Result: Changes should be discarded, profile remains unchanged

Scenario: Upload profile picture - gallery
Steps: 1. Tap avatar. 2. Choose from gallery. 3. Select image
Expected Result: Profile picture should update

Scenario: Upload profile picture - camera
Steps: 1. Tap avatar. 2. Take photo. 3. Capture and accept
Expected Result: Profile picture should update

Scenario: Upload profile picture - size limit
Steps: 1. Tap avatar. 2. Select image > 5MB
Expected Result: Error message 'Image size exceeds 5MB limit'

Scenario: Remove profile picture
Steps: 1. Tap avatar. 2. Select Remove photo
Expected Result: Avatar should revert to default placeholder

Scenario: Change password - successful
Steps: 1. Tap Change Password. 2. Enter current, new, confirm. 3. Save
Expected Result: Password changes successfully, success message shown

Scenario: Change password - incorrect current password
Steps: 1. Tap Change Password. 2. Enter wrong current password. 3. Save
Expected Result: Error 'Incorrect current password'

Scenario: Change password - mismatch
Steps: 1. Tap Change Password. 2. New and confirm passwords differ
Expected Result: Error 'Passwords do not match'

Scenario: Change password - weak password
Steps: 1. Tap Change Password. 2. Enter weak new password (e.g., '123')
Expected Result: Error 'Password too weak'

Scenario: Update academic details
Steps: 1. Navigate to Academic Section. 2. Update CGPA. 3. Save
Expected Result: Academic details updated successfully

Scenario: Update skills
Steps: 1. Navigate to Skills section. 2. Add new skill. 3. Save
Expected Result: New skill added to profile

Scenario: Remove skill
Steps: 1. Navigate to Skills section. 2. Tap delete icon on skill
Expected Result: Skill removed from profile

Scenario: Upload resume - PDF
Steps: 1. Tap Upload Resume. 2. Select PDF file
Expected Result: Resume uploaded successfully

Scenario: Upload resume - invalid format
Steps: 1. Tap Upload Resume. 2. Select image file
Expected Result: Error 'Only PDF/DOCX formats allowed'

Scenario: Delete resume
Steps: 1. Tap delete icon next to resume
Expected Result: Resume deleted, prompt to upload new one

Scenario: Navigate to Settings
Steps: 1. Go to Profile. 2. Tap Settings gear icon
Expected Result: Settings screen loaded

Scenario: Toggle push notifications
Steps: 1. In Settings, toggle Push Notifications
Expected Result: Toggle state changes and saves

Scenario: Toggle email notifications
Steps: 1. In Settings, toggle Email Notifications
Expected Result: Toggle state changes and saves

Scenario: Change theme - Dark Mode
Steps: 1. In Settings, select Theme -> Dark Mode
Expected Result: App theme immediately changes to dark

Scenario: Change theme - Light Mode
Steps: 1. In Settings, select Theme -> Light Mode
Expected Result: App theme immediately changes to light

Scenario: Change theme - System Default
Steps: 1. In Settings, select Theme -> System Default
Expected Result: App theme matches system theme

Scenario: Clear app cache
Steps: 1. In Settings, tap Clear Cache. 2. Confirm
Expected Result: Success message 'Cache cleared'

Scenario: View Privacy Policy
Steps: 1. In Settings, tap Privacy Policy
Expected Result: Privacy policy webview or screen opens

Scenario: View Terms of Service
Steps: 1. In Settings, tap Terms of Service
Expected Result: Terms of service webview or screen opens

Scenario: About App section
Steps: 1. In Settings, tap About
Expected Result: App version and developer info displayed

Scenario: Check for updates
Steps: 1. In About, tap Check for Updates
Expected Result: Shows 'App is up to date' or update prompt

Scenario: Contact Support
Steps: 1. In Settings, tap Contact Support. 2. Fill form. 3. Send
Expected Result: Support request sent successfully

Scenario: Delete Account request
Steps: 1. In Settings, tap Delete Account. 2. Confirm
Expected Result: Warning prompt appears

Scenario: Cancel Delete Account
Steps: 1. Tap Delete Account. 2. Tap Cancel on prompt
Expected Result: Dialog closes, account not deleted

Scenario: Logout from Settings
Steps: 1. Scroll to bottom of Settings. 2. Tap Logout. 3. Confirm
Expected Result: User logged out, routed to login screen
